No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to health or well-being outcomes.

Quality Education.reason: The course is an advanced graduate-level seminar, directly providing quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and significantly enhancing research skills and academic contribution (Targets 4.4, 4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The prerequisite '性別思維與法律批判' (Gender Thinking and Legal Critique) indicates students may apply research methods to gender issues, aligning with SDG 5.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to water or sanitation issues.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to decent work or economic growth.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's focus on '法律與社會研究' (Law and Society Research) and '社會參與及人文關懷的能力' (social participation and humane care) supports analyzing and addressing inequalities (Target 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course, 'Seminar on Culture and Law,' is fundamentally centered on '法律與社會研究' (Law and Society Research), directly promoting the rule of law, access to justice, and effective institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The requirement to '參與台灣法理學年會' (participate in Taiwan Jurisprudence Annual Conference) involves knowledge sharing and academic partnerships (Target 17.16).
